nasb.text: Then the Lord said to him, “Go down and come up again, you and Aaron with you; but do not let the priests and the people break through to come up to the Lord, or He will break forth upon them.”

esv.text: And the Lord said to him, “Go down, and come up bringing Aaron with you. But do not let the priests and the people break through to come up to the Lord, lest he break out against them.”

cnv.text: 耶和華對他說：“下去吧，你要和亞倫一起再上來，只是祭司和人民都不可闖過來，上到我這裡，恐怕我忽然擊殺他們。”

ccb.text: 耶和华对他说：“你下去把亚伦一起带来，祭司和百姓仍要留在原来的地方，不得乱闯到我面前，免得我忽然出来击杀他们。”
